documentation.content: Cloud Run API is returning elevated 5xx responses.

conditionMonitoringQueryLanguage.query:
fetch cloud_run_revision
| {
    total: metric 'run.googleapis.com/request_count'
      | align rate(1m)
      | every 1m;
    errors: metric 'run.googleapis.com/request_count'
      | filter metric.response_code_class == '5xx'
      | align rate(1m)
      | every 1m
  }
| ratio
| condition val() > 0.05
